title: T-Cut Colour Fast White Car Wax Polish Scratch Remover Colour Enhancer - 150g
features: T-Cut Colourfast Scratch remover (patent pending formula) removes scratches, scuffs, blemishes and adds colour in one easy application.
T-Cut is enhanced by the latest nanotechnology, making it easier to remove light scratches* and mask, deeper scratches.
The coloured pigments blend in with all shades of paintwork, cleaning and removing oxidation, creating a flawless colour-matched finish.
If it says T-Cut it works!
Available in Red, Green, Blue, White, Silver and Black
description: Product Description If it says T-CUT It Works! Since 1954, T-Cut has been looking after the nation’s cars. T-Cut is always asked for by name and is synonymous with removing scratches and restoring vehicle paintwork. The range today consists of waxes, detailers and technical restoration products to give your car that special showroom finish. T-Cut is proud to be owned and manufactured in Britain. T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover and Paint Restorer The 3 in 1 one step solution for restoring your vehicles bodywork T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover is designed to easily remove blemishes, scuffs, and light surface scratches in a simple application. A surface scratch can be identified by passing a fingernail over the mark and feeling no obstruction. T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover is enhanced by colour pigments and advanced wax technology to enrich the depth of colour of your paintwork whilst also masking deeper scratches. Cutting edge Nano Technology helps to remove light scratches and surface imperfections Impregnated colour pigments help to restore faded or dulled paintwork Added Wax content leaves bodywork with a durable high gloss finish that protects and looks like a fresh factory finish Note: Do not use if lacquer coat is damaged, cracked, or crazed. T-Cut contains abrasives. Take care to not remove excessive amounts of paint which may cause the primer to show. Avoid hard rubbing on angled surfaces e.g., the edges of wings. Do not use on newly painted surfaces, glossy surfaces may become dull, always test on an inconspicuous area to ensure compatibility. How the 3 in 1 One Step Process Works Removes Scratches Step One - Removes Scratches Using Nano Technology The first step in the restoration is to remove light scratches, oxidation, ingrained dirt, bugs and surface imperfections. T-Cut is enhanced with the latest Nano Technology making this as easy as possible. Adds Colour Pigment Step Two - Adds Pigment to Restore the Original Paintwork Colour The second step is to add coloured pigments which enriches the cars existing paint colour, blending seamlessly with all shades of the chosen colour, to mask deep scratches and create a flawless colour matched finish. Waxes for Shine Step Three - Waxes for Protection and Long Lasting Shine The final step is the wax contained within T-Cut Color Fast, which produces a high gloss, protective shine that lasts and lasts. All these steps are completed in one easy application, for complete cleaning, restoration and polishing. GOT QUESTIONS? - MAYBE WE CAN ANSWER THEM. Will this remove scratches that go through the paintwork? No, only surface scratches can be polished out but deep scratches will be masked by the added colour from the product. There are lots of shades of white paintwork will this work for my car? Yes, the specially designed formula is created to achieve a flawless colour match for all shades of white paint. Is it easy to use? Yes, it couldn't be more simple, wash and dry your car. Shake the bottle and apply sparingly to one panel at a time using a damp cloth. Allow it to dry to a haze and buff with a dry lint free cloth. repeat across the vehicle. Directions for Use: Wash car with a good quality car shampoo and dry with a chamois or microfibre cloth. Ensure you identify the type of scratch. T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover is formulated to remove light surface scratches which can be identified by passing a fingernail over the mark and feeling no obstruction. If an obstruction is felt, this means the scratch is deeper than a surface scratch and T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover will only help in masking the scratch. Shake the tube well and squeeze T-Cut Color Fast Scratch Remover on to a damp cloth. Apply sparingly to the affected area. Rub in a circular motion until the scratch is removed. Wipe off excess before it dries.
